name: Zhuhai Orbita Aerospace Science & Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhuhai Orbita Aerospace Science & Technology Co., Ltd. develops, produces, and sells aerospace electronic chips and electronic chip systems in China. The company's products include SOC, SIP, and EMBC chips; micro nano satellite constellation systems; satellite big data collecting and analyzing products; facial recognition and image processing products; artificial intelligence systems; avionics systems; and intelligent weapon systems. Its products are used in aerospace, aviation, industry control, territorial resources, municipal engineering, intelligent security, artificial intelligence, public consumption, and various other fields. The company was formerly known as Zhuhai Orbita Control Engineering Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Zhuhai Orbita Aerospace Science & Technology Co., Ltd. in September 2017. Zhuhai Orbita Aerospace Science & Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is based in Zhuhai, China.
